title: campylospermum calophyllum
intro: Campylospermum calophyllum is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the chalice vine. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant's extracts have been shown to possess various health benefits, such as protecting against liver damage, reducing fever, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Campylospermum calophyllum can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to the lack of extensive research on its safety and efficacy.
